summary: Tested CustomerDetailsModal component in Loans section. Found and fixed 1 bug: loansApi.updateLead was called but method is named 'update'. All 3 tabs (Customer Info, Vehicles, Documents) working correctly. Edit mode, save functionality, add vehicle, loan requirements editing, and Vaahan refresh all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: loansApi.updateLead -> loansApi.update in CustomerDetailsModal.jsx line 60
context_for_next_testing_agent: CustomerDetailsModal component fully tested. All features working: 1) Customer Info tab with Edit/Save, 2) Vehicles tab with Add vehicle, Edit loan requirements, Vaahan refresh, Delete vehicle, 3) Documents tab with upload buttons. Bug fixed: loansApi.updateLead -> loansApi.update

features_tested.customer_info_tab_view: PASS - Displays First Name, Last Name, PAN, Gender, Mobile, Email
features_tested.customer_info_tab_edit: PASS - Edit button opens form with all fields editable
features_tested.customer_info_save: PASS - Save button calls loansApi.update and shows success toast
features_tested.vehicles_tab_view: PASS - Shows vehicle count, vehicle cards with Vaahan data
features_tested.add_vehicle: PASS - Input field and Add button work, vehicle added successfully
features_tested.loan_requirements_edit: PASS - Edit button shows form, Save updates values
features_tested.vaahan_refresh: PASS - Refresh button fetches Vaahan data successfully
features_tested.documents_tab: PASS - Shows 13 document requirements with Upload buttons

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to loansApi.update which is the correct method name in api.js
